## X-Sense Home Security v1.2.6.57

### Camera WebRTC
- Queues Home Assistant ICE candidates that arrive before the X-Sense signal session is ready.
- Forwards queued browser ICE candidates into the X-Sense signaling session before startup continues.
- Keeps the native Home Assistant WebRTC audio/video path active without AlexxIT/WebRTC, go2rtc, aiortc, or transcoding.

### Debug Logging
- Updates the WebRTC candidate diagnostics to show when early Home Assistant ICE candidates are queued and forwarded.
- Keeps SDP, ICE candidates, ticket signatures, tokens, and full serial numbers out of debug logs.
